# stb — place file here

This directory is intentionally empty. Download stb_image_write.h
from https://github.com/nothings/stb and save it as
`stb_image_write.h` in this directory:

```sh
curl -L -o stb_image_write.h \
    https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nothings/stb/master/stb_image_write.h
```

Tested with v1.16. See ../../README.md and ../../BUILD_LINUX.md for
full instructions.

stb is dual-licensed: Public Domain (Unlicense) or MIT.
